customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, working well, and appreciate its ease of use and professional installation process. Moreover, they consider it an affordable water purifier with amazing water quality after purification, and one customer mentions it saves money on canned or packaged water. However, opinions about service are mixed, with some customers reporting very bad service while others find it satisfactory.

reviews.author: Prasanthgurrala
reviews.title: Good to use
reviews.body: The product looks good and it is budget friendly and ease to use

reviews.author: Shai
reviews.title: Worth buying. Free installation was quick and good technician sent by the company.
reviews.body: Good product so far. Have used it only a few days, so far so good. We have used an RO system from Eureka Forbes in the past as well and had a good experience. This one came in one day after ordering and was installed within 48 hrs. Good experience with installation as well.

reviews.author: sujata
reviews.title: GOOD PRODUCT 👍
reviews.body: We are using it for last 1 month, it is working good. Maintaining TDS level with no Noise level. Good Product.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Excellent water purifier with great service
reviews.body: I have been using the **Aquaguard Delight Aquasaver Water Purifier** and I am extremely satisfied with its performance. The water quality is excellent, with a fresh and clean taste that gives complete confidence in the safety of the drinking water. The installation process was very smooth and hassle-free. The Aquaguard service team was prompt, professional, and ensured everything was set up properly. Their customer support and after-sales service have been impressive, with quick responses whenever assistance is needed. One feature I particularly like is the **built-in TDS meter**, which allows
